last_seen_claim: IANA page showed Last Updated 2026-06-17 and range policy for System/User/Dynamic ports.
title: IANA Service Name and Transport Protocol Port Number Registry
use_policy: Use as primary registry for port assignment policy and service names; do not treat port observation as proof of service identity or benign traffic.

last_seen_claim: IANA page showed Last Updated 2026-06-12 and RFC6838/RFC2046 references.
title: IANA Media Types Registry
use_policy: Use to normalize Content-Type/MIME evidence; validate actual bytes/magic when file repair or conversion matters.

last_seen_claim: IANA page showed Last Updated 2025-09-15, RFC9110 reference, and HTTP status classes.
title: IANA HTTP Status Code Registry
use_policy: Use as primary status-code registry; diagnose with method, URL, proxy/CDN, auth, logs, and server/app context.

last_seen_claim: IANA page showed Last Updated 2026-05-15 and RFC9110/RFC9651 references.
title: IANA HTTP Field Name Registry
use_policy: Use to normalize HTTP header field names/status; keep header values redacted when they contain secrets/cookies/tokens.

last_seen_claim: IANA SSH parameters page references RFC4250/RFC9519 and algorithm-name registries.
title: IANA Secure Shell (SSH) Protocol Parameters
use_policy: Use for SSH algorithm normalization and compatibility diagnosis; do not expose private keys, known_hosts secrets, or hostnames without redaction.

last_seen_claim: IANA page references RFC2131/RFC2132 and DHCP/BOOTP option registries.
title: IANA BOOTP Vendor Extensions and DHCP Options
use_policy: Use for DHCP option identification; collect lease, server, relay, VLAN and packet context before proposing repair.

last_seen_claim: IANA TLS parameters page includes registry notes for DTLS/TLS cipher suites and related YANG updates.
title: IANA TLS Parameters
use_policy: Use for TLS alert/cipher/extension normalization; validate with openssl/gnutls/curl/browser logs and avoid leaking certificates/private keys.

last_seen_claim: AOSP states that build ID gives information such as platform release, code branch, and branch/sync date.
title: AOSP Codenames, Tags, and Build Numbers
use_policy: Use for Android build/tag identity; vendor firmware packages still need model/region/carrier/bootloader metadata.
